user_profile.name: Tyler Wade
communication_preferences: Creative and visionary - ride the energy, keep grounded on next steps
Acknowledge frustration, provide simplest path forward
Has ADHD - agentic follow-through is crucial
technical_preferences: Android phone, Windows laptop, old Mac desktop

agent_registry.description: Paperclip routing table — defines all domain agents, their capabilities, and endpoints

agents.name: Caroline
agents.description: Front door. Receives all requests, routes via Hermes, synthesizes final answer, delivers back to Tyler. Never solves alone — always orchestrates.

agents.name: ConstructAgent
agents.description: 25 years of construction knowledge. Job costing, estimating, code compliance, materials, scheduling, subcontractor management.

agents.name: CodeAgent
agents.description: Software development, debugging, architecture design, repo analysis across all 52 Wade repos.

agents.name: MemoryAgent
agents.description: Reads/writes WGS. Recalls past sessions, project history, decisions made. The ecosystem's long-term memory.

agents.name: WebAgent
agents.description: Real-time web search, X search, current prices, news, research.

agents.name: BusinessAgent
agents.description: Wade Custom Carpentry operations. Client management, invoicing, scheduling, receptionist functions.

agents.name: NeuroRankAgent
agents.description: NeuroRank™ cognitive scoring. Evaluates request complexity across 7 regions. Tells Hermes how to weight each domain agent's response.

agents.name: AuditAgent
agents.description: The judge. Receives all domain agent responses independently. Cross-checks for contradiction and hallucination. Synthesizes verified answer. Never participates — only evaluates.

message_bus.description: Hermes routing layer — live request queue, chunked tasks, and result aggregation

chunking_rules.description: OpenClaw — how Caroline chunks a natural language request into domain tasks

caroline_ai_project.name: Caroline AI
caroline_ai_project.goal: Personal AI companion, voice-to-voice with emotional personality
caroline_ai_project.status: xAI Realtime WebSocket wired — voice agent active
vision: Recursive generation: feed old AI conversations into new model, creating evolving personality
Merge data from ALL AI platforms into one model
Fine-tune on construction data for world-class residential construction AI
Build voice-first AI OS — Centauri OS
Eventually: portable AI brain for humanoid robotics
